faction.sylvan-court.name: Sylvan Court
unit.t1-lucine.name: Lucine
unit.t2-archer-sylvestre.name: Sylvan Archer
unit.t3-dryade.name: Dryad
unit.t4-loup-argent.name: Silver Wolf
unit.t5-licorne.name: Unicorn
unit.t6-treant.name: Treant
unit.t7-aieul.name: Elder of the Wood
unit.t1-lucine-elite.name: Nymph
unit.t2-archer-sylvestre-elite.name: Master Archer
unit.t3-dryade-elite.name: Elder Dryad
unit.t4-loup-argent-elite.name: Spectral Wolf
unit.t5-licorne-elite.name: War Unicorn
unit.t6-treant-elite.name: Ancient Treant
unit.t7-aieul-elite.name: Awakened Elder
unit.t1-lucine.lore: We fly faster than rumor. What the Court whispers, the wood has already decided.
unit.t1-lucine-elite.lore: We have no age, only seasons. This one we have chosen for war.
unit.t2-archer-sylvestre.lore: We do not aim at the enemy. We aim where the forest wants him dead.
unit.t2-archer-sylvestre-elite.lore: Twelve arrows, twelve certainties. We do not count the bodies; the wood keeps that tally.
unit.t3-dryade.lore: We root for a moment, and the soil returns us harder. Then we walk on.
unit.t3-dryade-elite.lore: We remember the first felling. We have forgotten nothing, and we do not forgive dead wood.
unit.t4-loup-argent.lore: Two bites, one heart. The pack is not many; it is the forest at a run.
unit.t4-loup-argent-elite.lore: Death did not stop it, only sharpened it. We still hunt beside those we have lost.
unit.t5-licorne.lore: Her horn heals or cleaves, as the fever demands. War is a sickness; we are the cure that bleeds.
unit.t5-licorne-elite.lore: We have stopped healing. Some limbs must be cut so the rest may live.
unit.t6-treant.lore: It walks: a tree that only stands has learned nothing from the storm. Rooted, it becomes a wall.
unit.t6-treant-elite.lore: We have watched whole forests fall. Some we felled ourselves. Still we walk.
unit.t7-aieul.lore: When the Elder rises, the forest moves. The world is one body, and it has just felt the pain.
unit.t7-aieul-elite.lore: We woke him knowing the price. To save the whole, we have amputated before, and we would again.
building.sylvan-court-heart-grove.lore: We are this grove, and this grove is us. What falls here already rises; we do not count the seasons.
